web.description: Martin now supports the MapLibre Tiles Specification. This means that if you want to serve MLT based tiles with this tileserver, you now can. Read more about ...

web.title: Installation - Martin Tile Server Documentation
web.description: Installation. Prerequisites. If using Martin with PostgreSQL database, you must install PostGIS with at least v3.0+. Postgis v3.1+ is recommended.

web.title: martin 1.3.1
web.description: Martin is a tile server and a set of tools able to generate vector tiles on the fly from large PostgreSQL databases, and serve tiles from PMTiles and MBTiles ...
